lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam man vasaae |
lines.english: He enshrines the Name of the Lord in his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naanak nadar kare so paae |
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Lord grants His Grace, He is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੇ ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhette so sukh paae |
lines.english: One who meets the True Guru finds peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਅੰਦੇਸੇ ਤੇ ਨਿਹਕੇਵਲੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aas andese te nihakeval haumai sabad jalaae |2|
lines.english: He becomes free of hope and fear, and burns away his ego with the Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਦੇ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਹਨਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਗਾਵਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat terai man bhaavade dar sohan keerat gaavade |
lines.english: Your devotees are pleasing to Your Mind, Lord. They look beautiful at Your door, singing Your Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਮੂਲੁ ਨ ਬੁਝਨੑਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਅਣਹੋਦਾ ਆਪੁ ਗਣਾਇਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik mool na bujhana aapanaa anahodaa aap ganaaeide |
lines.english: Some do not understand their origins, and without cause, they display their self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮਾ ਬਾਹਰੇ ਦਰਿ ਢੋਅ ਨ ਲਹਨੑੀ ਧਾਵਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak karamaa baahare dar dtoa na lehanaee dhaavade |
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are denied Your Grace, find no shelter at Your Door; they continue wandering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਢਾਢੀ ਕਾ ਨੀਚ ਜਾਤਿ ਹੋਰਿ ਉਤਮ ਜਾਤਿ ਸਦਾਇਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: hau dtaadtee kaa neech jaat hor utam jaat sadaaeide |
lines.english: I am the Lord's minstrel, of low social status; others call themselves high caste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਮੰਗਾ ਜਿ ਤੁਝੈ ਧਿਆਇਦੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: tina mangaa ji tujhai dhiaaeide |9|
lines.english: I seek those who meditate on You. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਮੰਡਪ ਕੂੜੁ ਮਾੜੀ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੈਸਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr manddap koorr maarree koorr baisanahaar |
lines.english: False is the mansion, false are the skyscrapers; false are those who live in them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਰਾਜਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਪਰਜਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr raajaa koorr parajaa koorr sabh sansaar |
lines.english: False is the king, false are the subjects; false is the whole world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਸੁਇਨਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਰੁਪਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਪੈਨੑਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr sueinaa koorr rupaa koorr painanahaar |
lines.english: False is gold, and false is silver; false are those who wear them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਾਇਆ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਪੜੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kaaeaa koorr kaparr koorr roop apaar |
lines.english: False is the body, false are the clothes; false is incomparable beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਮੀਆ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੀਬੀ ਖਪਿ ਹੋਏ ਖਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr meea koorr beebee khap hoe khaar |
lines.english: False is the husband, false is the wife; they mourn and waste away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਮਿਠਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਮਾਖਿਉ ਕੂੜੁ ਡੋਬੇ ਪੂਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr mitthaa koorr maakhiau koorr ddobe poor |
lines.english: False is sweetness, false is honey; through falsehood, boat-loads of men have drowned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਿ ਕੂੜੈ ਨੇਹੁ ਲਗਾ ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr koorrai nehu lagaa visariaa karataar |
lines.english: The false ones love falsehood, and forget their Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਨਾਲਿ ਕੀਚੈ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਚਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kis naal keechai dosatee sabh jag chalanahaar |
lines.english: With whom should I become friends, if all the world shall pass away?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤਾ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਚਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach taa par jaaneeai jaa ridai sachaa hoe |
lines.english: One knows the Truth only when the Truth is in his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਬਾਝੁ ਕੂੜੋ ਕੂੜੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhaanai benatee tudh baajh koorro koorr |1|
lines.english: Nanak speaks this prayer: without You, Lord, everything is totally false. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤਾ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਸਚਿ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach taa par jaaneeai jaa sach dhare piaar |
lines.english: One knows the Truth only when he bears love to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਤਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਹਛਾ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kee mal utarai tan kare hachhaa dhoe |
lines.english: The filth of falsehood departs, and the body is washed clean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨੁ ਰਹਸੀਐ ਤਾ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naau sun man rahaseeai taa paae mokh duaar |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, the mind is enraptured; then, he attains the gate of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਸਾਧਿ ਕੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਦੇਇ ਕਰਤਾ ਬੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: dharat kaaeaa saadh kai vich dee karataa beeo |
lines.english: Preparing the field of the body, he plants the Seed of the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤਾ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach taa par jaaneeai jaa jugat jaanai jeeo |
lines.english: One knows the Truth only when he knows the true way of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: deaa jaanai jeea kee kichh pun daan karee |
lines.english: Showing mercy to other beings, he makes donations to charities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤਾ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਸਿਖ ਸਚੀ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach taa par jaaneeai jaa sikh sachee lee |
lines.english: One knows the Truth only when he receives true instruction.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤਾਂ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਆਤਮ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach taan par jaaneeai jaa aatam teerath kare nivaas |
lines.english: One knows the Truth only when he dwells in the sacred shrine of pilgrimage of his own soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਨੋ ਪੁਛਿ ਕੈ ਬਹਿ ਰਹੈ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: satiguroo no puchh kai beh rahai kare nivaas |
lines.english: He sits and receives instruction from the True Guru, and lives in accordance with His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਜਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਪਲੈ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhaanai benatee jin sach palai hoe |2|
lines.english: Nanak speaks this prayer to those who have Truth in their laps. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਹੋਇ ਦਾਰੂ ਪਾਪ ਕਢੈ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach sabhanaa hoe daaroo paap kadtai dhoe |
lines.english: Truth is the medicine for all; it removes and washes away our sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਾ ਲਾਲਚੁ ਛਡੀਐ ਹੋਇ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: koorraa laalach chhaddeeai hoe ik man alakh dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: Renounce false greed, and meditate single-mindedly on the unseen Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨੁ ਮਹਿੰਡਾ ਤਲੀ ਖਾਕੁ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: daan mahinddaa talee khaak je milai ta masatak laaeeai |
lines.english: The gift I seek is the dust of the feet of the Saints; if I were to obtain it, I would apply it to my forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲੁ ਤੇਵੇਹੋ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇਵੇਹੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: fal teveho paaeeai jevehee kaar kamaaeeai |
lines.english: As are the actions we commit, so are the rewards we receive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਾ ਧੂੜਿ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਦੀ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: je hovai poorab likhiaa taa dhoorr tinaa dee paaeeai |
lines.english: If it is so pre-ordained, then one obtains the dust of the feet of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਉ ਬੀਜਿ ਪਤਿ ਲੈ ਗਏ ਅਬ ਕਿਉ ਉਗਵੈ ਦਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: beeo beej pat lai ge ab kiau ugavai daal |
lines.english: Those who planted their seed have departed with honor; now, how can the shattered seed sprout?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਵਰਤਿਆ ਕਲਿ ਕਾਲਖ ਬੇਤਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sach kaal koorr varatiaa kal kaalakh betaal |
lines.english: There is a famine of Truth; falsehood prevails, and the blackness of the Dark Age of Kali Yuga has turned men into demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਥੋੜੀ ਸੇਵ ਗਵਾਈਐ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: mat thorree sev gavaaeeai |10|
lines.english: But through small-mindedness, we forfeit the merits of selfless service. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਇਕੁ ਹੋਇ ਤ ਉਗਵੈ ਰੁਤੀ ਹੂ ਰੁਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: je ik hoe ta ugavai rutee hoo rut hoe |
lines.english: If the seed is whole, and it is the proper season, then the seed will sprout.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਹੈ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਕੋਰੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak paahai baaharaa korai rang na soe |
lines.english: O Nanak, without treatment, the raw fabric cannot be dyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤੀ ਜੇ ਰਪੈ ਕੂੜੈ ਸੋਇ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagatee je rapai koorrai soe na koe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, if one is imbued with devotional worship, his reputation is not false. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਖੁੰਬਿ ਚੜਾਈਐ ਸਰਮੁ ਪਾਹੁ ਤਨਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai vich khunb charraaeeai saram paahu tan hoe |
lines.english: In the Fear of God it is bleached white, if the treatment of modesty is applied to the cloth of the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਨੇਬੁ ਸਦਿ ਪੁਛੀਐ ਬਹਿ ਬਹਿ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaam neb sad puchheeai beh beh kare beechaar |
lines.english: Sexual desire, the chief advisor, is summoned and consulted; they all sit together and contemplate their plans.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਪਾਪੁ ਦੁਇ ਰਾਜਾ ਮਹਤਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਿਕਦਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: lab paap due raajaa mahataa koorr hoaa sikadaar |
lines.english: Greed and sin are the king and prime minister; falsehood is the treasurer.
